name: Ticketing
tagline: A help-desk workflow with a ticket lifecycle and a cross-context SLA policy.
description: A two-context support domain. TicketManagement models a Ticket aggregate whose lifecycle is an explicit state machine (Open → Assigned/Escalated/Resolved → Closed → Reopened), guarded by invariants such as 'a resolved ticket must have a resolution', 'a closed ticket cannot be reassigned', and 'an urgent ticket requires a justification'. Commands assign/escalate/resolve/close advance the machine and emit domain events. A separate SLA context tracks each ticket's response deadline and publishes a SlaBreached integration event when a promise is broken; the context map wires the two together with a single bidirectional customer-supplier relationship that authorizes both subscriptions.
teaches: state machines for an entity lifecycle
commands that guard and emit events
context maps with a bidirectional customer-supplier relationship
